sourceMovie.title: Nightcrawler
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Nightcrawler works as a crime movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The crime and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Silence of the Lambs
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Nightcrawler clicked for you, The Silence of the Lambs (1991) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and drama, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Nightcrawler?
faq.answer: Try The Silence of the Lambs, Insomnia, Kiss the Girls—each shares DNA with Nightcrawler while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Nightcrawler?
faq.answer: Nightcrawler (2014) is best described as Crime, Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Nightcrawler worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this crime lane.
